activities_projects.title: Detailed Climatic Controls Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how multiple factors interact to affect climate
steps: Select a region in India
Identify climatic controls affecting the region
Explain how each control influences the local climate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze climate formation using multiple factors

activities_projects.title: Monsoon Mechanism Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Understand the complete mechanism of monsoon winds
steps: Draw a diagram showing pressure systems
Indicate movement of winds from ocean to land
Explain the formation of southwest monsoon
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand atmospheric circulation affecting monsoon

activities_projects.title: Regional Climate Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare climates of two different regions
steps: Select two regions such as Rajasthan and Kerala
Compare temperature, rainfall and seasons
Explain reasons for differences

activities_projects.title: Rainfall Variability Study
steps: Collect rainfall data for two Indian cities
Compare annual rainfall patterns
Explain reasons for differences

activities_projects.title: Cyclone Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the impact of tropical cyclones
steps: Select a recent cyclone event
Describe where and when it occurred
Explain its impact on people and environment

activities_projects.title: Monsoon Agriculture Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the link between monsoon and agriculture
steps: List crops dependent on monsoon rainfall
Explain how irregular monsoon affects farmers
Suggest two solutions to reduce problems

activities_projects.title: Temperature Range Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study diurnal and annual temperature ranges
steps: Identify a place with high temperature range
Identify a place with low temperature range
Explain the reasons for these differences

activities_projects.title: Rain Shadow Region Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of rain shadow
steps: Locate the Western Ghats on a map
Identify areas receiving less rainfall behind the mountains
Explain why rain shadow regions are dry
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand relief influence on rainfall

activities_projects.title: Retreating Monsoon Analysis
steps: Read about retreating monsoon
Explain why Tamil Nadu receives rainfall during this season
Describe the role of cyclones
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the transition season in India

activities_projects.title: Climate and Lifestyle Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand how climate influences human life
steps: Select two regions with different climates
Describe clothing, houses and food habits
Explain how climate influences these aspects
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the relationship between climate and lifestyle
